description: The TrailLifetimeRangeInitializer component makes trails in a particle syste m be born with a random lifetime a point generated by them will exist before disappearing at the end of the trail.

fields.MinValue: The minimum lifetime a trail can have.
fields.MaxValue: The maximum lifetime a trail can have.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
